tags.name: `mc-select-native`
tags.description: Purpose: A native select component for selecting one option from a list. Category: Forms When to use: When you need to present a list of options for the user to choose from. When not to use: For single input fields or when space is not a concern. Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-dialog, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-step-indicator-item, mc-table, mc-tabs Alternative component names: Dropdown, ComboBox, Select Box, Picklist Events: * `change` {`CustomEvent`} - Emitted when the selected status changes. * `focus` {`CustomEvent`} - * `blur` {`CustomEvent`} - * `input` {`CustomEvent`} - Slots: * ``label`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-select-native. * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the select. * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the select. Attributes: * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property. It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`. * `labelposition` {`LabelPosition`} - Position od the label and text alignment within label. * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the select. * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value, then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only * `options` {`McSelectNativeOptions | undefined`} - Options are required. They can be passed as an array: `["One", "Two"]` or as an array of objects: `[{value: 1, label: "One"}, {value: 2, label: "Two"}]` * `placeholder` {`string`} - The `placeholder` attribute specifies a short hint that describes the expected value of a field (e.g. a sample value or a short description of the expected format) * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot: `hint text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text. * `variant` {`"default" | "vanity" | "multiple"`} - Variant of the select. * `id` {`string`} - Sets id for the input field. * `invalid` {`boolean`} - Sets select in the `invalid` state. * `errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error message will be shown only if `invalid` attribute is set to `true`. Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot: `error message as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text. * `selectedindex` {`number[] | undefined`} - Specifies the selected indexes. If supplied, then the value array will be disregarded. * `width` {`string`} - The width of the inner input container in percentage. * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets select in the `disabled` state. * `name` {`string | undefined`} - Name is required if the component is used inside a `form` element. * `value` {`McSelectNativeOptions | null | undefined`} - The initial value of the input. * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - * `type` {`string | undefined`} - * `required` {`boolean`} - Sets select in the `required` state. Properties: * `isFirstUpdate` {`boolean`} - * `_value` {`McSelectNativeOptions | null | undefined`} - * `isPlaceholderActive` {`boolean`} - * `select` {`HTMLSelectElement | null | undefined`} - * `focused` {`boolean`} - * `inputId` {`string`} - * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property. It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`. * `labelposition` {`LabelPosition`} - Position od the label and text alignment within label. * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the select. * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value, then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only * `options` {`McSelectNativeOptions | undefined`} - Options are required. They can be passed as an array: `["One", "Two"]` or as an array of objects: `[{value: 1, label: "One"}, {value: 2, label: "Two"}]` * `placeholder` {`string`} - The `placeholder` attribute specifies a short hint that describes the expected value of a field (e.g. a sample value or a short description of the expected format) * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot: `hint text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text. * `variant` {`"default" | "vanity" | "multiple"`} - Variant of the select. * `id` {`string`} - Sets id for the input field. * `invalid` {`boolean`} - Sets select in the `invalid` state. * `errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error message will be shown only if `invalid` attribute is set to `true`. Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot: `error message as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text. * `selectedindex` {`number[] | undefined`} - Specifies the selected indexes. If supplied, then the value array will be disregarded. * `width` {`string`} - The width of the inner input container in percentage. * `focus` - Focuses the mc-select-native. * `blur` - Takes the focus out of the mc-select-native. * `change` - Change the selected value of the mc-select-native. * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - Sets select in the `disabled` state. * `_onMouseDown` - * `name` {`string | undefined`} - Name is required if the component is used inside a `form` element. * `value` {`McSelectNativeOptions | null | undefined`} - The initial value of the input. * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - * `type` {`string | undefined`} - * `required` {`boolean`} - Sets select in the `required` state. * `hiddenInput` {`HTMLInputElement | undefined`} - * `controlType` {`string | undefined`} - * `isCheckable` {`boolean`} - * `inputType` {`string`} -

attributes.description:
`label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`.
